## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Validator
- [ ] Skill package
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Checks

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_release.py`
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall scripts skills/sku-skill-builder/scripts skills/sku-skill-builder/references`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Data Safety

- [ ] No private product briefs, unreleased assets, customer data, credentials, or local machine paths are included.
- [ ] Public examples are fictional or approved for release.
